description: Get dressed in these black heels from catwalk for a glam look. The woven straps lend a dose of edginess to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Synthetic straps on the forefoot, midfoot and behind ankle for durability and protection Woven interlaced design for added style Ankle strap with buckle for a snug Fit Midsole Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Outsole wedge heels for better support TPU outsole with grid pattern on the forefoot and heel for extra grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
